description: KYN AI is a member-facing app from IOK Labs Inc. that helps Sweat & Tonic members analyze their class history, plan weekly bookings, and automate booking actions through the studio’s booking platform. It also offers a ChatGPT companion experience for querying schedules and booking plans.
summary: KYN exposes one known integration surface: an OAuth-protected MCP server at https://mcp.kynapp.ca/mcp for its KYN AI fitness-planning companion in ChatGPT.
